title: Admin Force Transition
content:
API->>API: Verify permission from JWT claims
Require actions.admin.force_transition
Missing → 403 Forbidden

API->>DB: UPDATE action
SET current_state=@toState, version=version+1
(NO guard evaluation — bypassed for force transitions)

API->>DB: INSERT state_history
from_state, to_state, force_transition=true
actor=admin user_id, reason

API->>DB: INSERT audit_event
action.force_transitioned
details {action_id, from_state, to_state, admin_id, reason}
(force transitions prominently flagged in audit trail)
